column2: Ranges the AMP source does NOT state, but the measurement does. Applied ONLY where the source is
silent. Every row carries its basis. This is the one place a bound not stated by an AMP source
enters a spec, so it is a reviewable file rather than a number buried in code.
WHY: these columns are declared 'continuous' / columnType=number with an EMPTY minimum and
maximum, so a spec built from the source alone leaves them unbounded and the generator draws
them from a generic 0-100 window. That produced a Krenn synovitis score of 55.1 on a 0-9 scale
and a systolic blood pressure of 12 mmHg.
SCOPED, not global. `height`, `weight` and `sex` exist in BOTH ARK and CMD, and ARK reports
height in INCHES while FUSION reports it in centimetres. A file keyed on the bare variable name
would apply one programme's bounds to the other -- the same collision that had HYPOMAP emitting
Adipose's value set. Scope is `ark` or `cmd:<sheet>`.
These are MEASUREMENT ranges -- the span of values actually seen in these patients -- not narrow
normal reference intervals. KPMP is a CKD/AKI cohort and FUSION spans normal glucose tolerance
to type 2 diabetes, so abnormal values are the point and must remain drawable.
►UNIT ASSUMED marks a field whose unit the workbook does NOT state. FUSION's only unit-bearing
field is bmi (kg/m^2) and it is a Finnish cohort, so SI units are assumed. Each is one line to

column6: maximum

Krenn synovitis score component: enlargement/hyperplasia of the synovial lining cell layer, scored 0-3. -1 = unknown, per ARK's own "If value unknown, use '-1'". (Krenn V et al., Histopathology 2006;49:358-364.)
Krenn synovitis score component: resident stromal cell density, scored 0-3. -1 = unknown, per ARK. (Krenn 2006.)
Krenn synovitis score component: degree of inflammatory infiltrate, scored 0-3. -1 = unknown, per ARK. (Krenn 2006.)
The Krenn Synovitis Score: the SUM of its three components (3+3+3=9), so 0-9. -1 = unknown, per ARK. COMPUTED, never drawn -- see scripts/gen/batch_08.py. (Krenn 2006.)
Participant age, years. KPMP enrols adults; the workbook says the age is "released as range in open file", i.e. bounded, but does not give the bound. Whole years.
BMI, kg/m^2 (unit stated). Spans severe underweight to class III obesity.
Systolic blood pressure, mmHg (unit stated). Spans profound hypotension to hypertensive crisis. Recorded as whole mmHg.
Diastolic blood pressure, mmHg (unit stated). Recorded as whole mmHg.
Haemoglobin A1c, % (unit stated). Non-diabetic ~4-5.6; poorly controlled diabetes reaches the high teens.
eGFR, mL/min/1.73m^2 (unit stated), race-free CKD-EPI. KPMP is a CKD/AKI cohort: kidney failure is <15, normal is ~90-120.
eGFR, mL/min/1.73m^2 (unit stated), CKD-EPI creatinine 2021. Same span as above.
eGFR, mL/min/1.73m^2 (unit stated), CKD-EPI cystatin C.
eGFR, mL/min/1.73m^2 (unit stated), CKD-EPI creatinine + cystatin C 2021.

Plasma albumin, g/dL -- the unit IS stated, in the description ("Enrollment central-lab plasma: Albumin (g/dL)"), just not in permissible_values. Nephrotic syndrome drives it well below the ~3.5-5.0 normal band.
Urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio, mg/g creatinine (unit stated). Normal <30; nephrotic-range albuminuria reaches the thousands.
Urine protein-to-creatinine ratio, mg/g creatinine (unit stated). Normal <150; nephrotic range is >3000 and can go far higher.

Years. The workbook DEFINES it: "Diabetes duration = np_age - mh_diabetes_age". mh_diabetes_age is NOT published, so the duration is drawn -- but it is bounded by the participant's own age and only exists for a diabetic. See scripts/gen/batch_09.py.
Years. The workbook DEFINES it: "Hypertension duration = np_age - mh_ht_age". mh_ht_age is NOT published, so the same treatment as diabetes_durationC.
Age at muscle biopsy, years. FUSION is an adult cohort. Whole years.
Body mass index, kg/m^2 (unit stated).
Standing height, cm. ►UNIT ASSUMED -- the workbook says only "Anthropometric measures / continuous".
Body weight, kg. ►UNIT ASSUMED.
Waist circumference, cm. ►UNIT ASSUMED.
Waist/hip ratio. Dimensionless, so no unit to assume.
Fasting serum insulin, pmol/L. ►UNIT ASSUMED (SI). Spans normal to the severe hyperinsulinaemia of insulin resistance.
OGTT plasma glucose, fasting, mmol/L. ►UNIT ASSUMED (SI). FUSION spans normal glucose tolerance to type 2 diabetes, so the diabetic range must remain drawable.
OGTT plasma glucose, 30 min, mmol/L. ►UNIT ASSUMED (SI). The post-load peak.
OGTT plasma glucose, 60 min, mmol/L. ►UNIT ASSUMED (SI).
OGTT plasma glucose, 120 min, mmol/L. ►UNIT ASSUMED (SI). The diagnostic 2-hour value: >=11.1 is diabetes, 7.8-11.0 impaired glucose tolerance.

RNA Integrity Number. This one is not an assumption: the RIN is DEFINED on a 1-10 scale by the algorithm that produces it (Schroeder A et al., BMC Molecular Biology 2006;7:3). 10 is intact, 1 is fully degraded.
